creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
devel/py-python-bugzilla was recently upgraded from 1.2.1 to 2.1.0

   https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=217806

Should this be merged from head to 2017Q3?

The current version on 2017Q3 is dated June 2015.  It is compatible with current Bugzilla?  If not, I propose it be MFH.

Thank you.
